pageDescription: Manage your branches and their menus.
copyMenuDescription: Copy all categories and items from one branch to another. The target branch's existing menu will be replaced.
copyMenuConfirmDescription: This will delete the current menu in {targetName} and replace it with the menu from {sourceName}. This cannot be undone.
copyMenuError: Failed to copy menu. Please try again.
copyMenuSameError: Source and target must be different branches.
compareMenuDescription: Compare categories, items, and prices between two branches.
addBranchError: Failed to create branch. Please try again.

workspace.title: Branch management
workspace.description: {count, plural, =0 {No branches yet. Add the first branch and finish setup from the owner view.} one {# branch in this company. Open owner view to manage setup, finance, team, and branch insight.} other {# branches in this company. Open owner view to manage setup, finance, team, and branch insight.}}
workspace.openOrdersCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 open orders} one {# open order} other {# open orders}}
workspace.staffCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 staff} one {# staff} other {# staff}}

alerts.setupNeeded: {count, plural, one {# branch still needs owner setup} other {# branches still need owner setup}}
alerts.monthCloseNeeded: {count, plural, one {# branch still needs month close} other {# branches still need month close}}
alerts.openOrders: {count, plural, one {# branch currently has open orders} other {# branches currently have open orders}}

stats.todayRevenueHint: {count, plural, =0 {0 open orders} one {# open order} other {# open orders}}
stats.totalExpensesHint: Purchase orders and expense records this month
stats.openOrdersHint: {count, plural, =0 {No branch has open orders} one {# branch has open orders} other {# branches have open orders}}
stats.branchesReadyPending: {count, plural, one {# still needs setup} other {# still need setup}}

workModes.dailyTitle: Open the branch that needs attention now
workModes.dailyDescription: Use this list for live orders, staffing, expenses, and month-close follow-up. Branch execution still opens in the branch workspace.
workModes.setupTitle: Set up the company foundation separately
workModes.setupDescription: Create the company menu once, then add branches that inherit it before local branch edits.

workspace.tableHint: Open a branch owner view for setup, finance, team, and detailed insight.
